title: ToonCraft JE: A wonderfully adorable texture pack
description: A cartoon-themed texture pack for Minecraft featuring vibrant colors, smooth textures, and playful visual effects. Perfect for players who enjoy a fun, imaginative, and lighthearted Minecraft experience.
body:
# **🎉 Welcome to ToonCraft!**

***

Hello and thank you for checking out ToonCraft 🙌. This **free demo version** lets you experience a taste of the realism and detail that RealisCraft brings to Minecraft.

If you enjoy it and want to unlock **higher resolutions, advanced features (POM, PBR, SSS, Emission, and more)**, consider upgrading to the **Full Version**. By supporting this project, you’re not only getting the best realistic texture pack, but also helping me continue to improve and expand RealisCraft for everyone. 💖

Enjoy your game, and thank you for being part of this journey! 🎮

 

## **💡 Note**

***

To get the same visual result as shown in the screenshots, you’ll need to install a shader pack.  
I personally recommend [**BSL Shaders**](https://texture-packs.com/shaders/bsl-shaders/) for the best experience.

 

## **🔹 Main Pack**

***

**ToonCraft: A wonderfully adorable texture pack (Full)**

*   [Patreon](https://patreon.com/MCToonCraft?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)
*   [Gumroad](https://scorpiographics2.gumroad.com/l/ToonCraft)

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4f5HAFDPAiw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **📌 Important Information**

***

**Update**: 1 time per month

**Support Contact**:

*   Twitter: [@Scorpiographic2](https://twitter.com/Scorpiographic2)
*   Instagram: [scropio\_graphics](https://instagram.com/scropio_graphics)
*   Email: [scorpiographicsdev@gmail.com](mailto:scorpiographicsdev@gmail.com)

 

## **🛠️ Features**

***

**ToonCraft JE (Demo)**

*   The essential pack
*   128x textures
*   Blocks only
*   Normal maps
*   Specular maps
*   Phisically Based Rendering

 

**ToonCraft JE (Full)**

*   The complete experience
*   256x, 512x, 1024x, and 2048x textures
*   Full featured
*   Normal maps
*   Specular maps
*   Parallax Occlusion Mapping
*   Phisically Based Rendering
*   SSS (Subsurface Scattering)
*   Porosity
*   Emission
*   Material AO
*   Optifine features

 

**ToonCraft BE (Demo)**

*   The essential pack
*   128x textures
*   Blocks only
*   Normal maps
*   Specular maps
*   Phisically Based Rendering

 

**ToonCraft BE (Full)**

*   The complete experience
*   256x textures
*   Full featured
*   Normal maps
*   Specular maps
*   Phisically Based Rendering
*   Emission
*   Material AO
*   Metallic

 

## **🌍 Compatibility**

***

*   **Minecraft Bedrock Edition 26+**
*   **Minecraft Java Edition 26+**
*   **Supports**: RTX, Vibrant Visuals, LabPBR 1.3, OldPBR

 

## **🔥 Why ToonCraft?**

***

*   **Clear & Fun Gameplay** → Bold, colorful textures that stay readable in every adventure.
*   **Stylized RTX Materials** → Cartoon reflections, crisp normal maps, and playful Parallax Occlusion Mapping.
*   **Next-Gen Compatibility** → Fully built on labPBR, optimized for SEUS PTGI, and ready for dynamic visuals.
*   **Playful Aesthetic** → A colorful, cartoon-inspired twist that keeps Minecraft’s original charm.

 

## **⚠️ Disclaimer**

***

*   For best results → use a shader pack.
*   Requires a high-performance device → try the Lite version first.
*   This product is digital only → no refunds.
*   Not affiliated with Mojang.

 

## **💬 Questions & Support**

***

"Why pay?" 👉 Because creating texture packs requires hardware, software, internet access, and time. By supporting, you help keep this project alive.

If your device is capable of 512x–2048x + shaders, you likely have a premium setup. So, $2–$5 support is a small price tag compared to what you're getting.

If you can't support it yet? Don't worry, there's a free version you can try first.

 

## **📜 Agreement**

***

✅ Allowed: creating videos/streaming with ToonCraft

✅ Allowed: modifying for personal use

❌ Not allowed: reuploading, redistributing, claiming as your own work

👉 If you want to share, use the official link

 

## **🙏 Credits**

***

*   **Mojang Studios** – for Minecraft
*   **You** – for supporting ToonCraft 🎉
